title: Fix Pydantic error in Product List API
description: The `/api/v1/products` endpoint is failing with a Pydantic validation error because `created_at` and `updated_at` are missing from the returned objects. Your task is to modify the `list_products` method in `backend/app/api/v1/products/repository.py` to ensure it includes the `created_at` and `updated_at` fields in the dictionary it returns, as required by the `ProductShortRead` schema located in `backend/app/api/v1/products/schemas.py`.
acceptance_criteria: The method must return `created_at` and `updated_at` fields for each product.
After the fix, a GET request to `/api/v1/products` must return a 200 OK status.
The response must be a list of products that successfully validates against the `ProductShortRead` schema.
